description: Disaster Relief - General: Natural Disasters, Medical, Shelters, Equipment

meshes.name: Earthquake Rubble Pile (It is equipped for flood response with water pump attachments bolted to the side panels, extended mud guards, an elevated air intake snorkel on the cab, and a sandbag rack welded to the roof. The surface is well-maintained: recently washed but showing honest service wear, touch-up paint visible on scratches, clean interior, tires at half tread, and minor surface rust on the undercarriage. The object stands alone on a clean pure white seamless backdrop, centered in frame, under even softbox studio lighting with gentle contact shadows. Product reference photograph for 3D model generation. Medium-format camera, 85mm lens, moderate depth of field. No watermark, no logos, no extra objects, no text overlays.

meshes.name: Searchlight Portable LED (It is a Pacific island disaster variant with saltwater-resistant marine-grade hardware and outrigger stabilizer mounts. The surface is pristine factory-new: fresh paint with no scratches, glossy finish, protective film still on instrument displays, and zero wear on tires and tracks.)
